GeneralBoatDescription:
2023/2026 HCB 53 

(New Quad Mercury Verado 600)


Motivated seller - All reasonable offers will be considered. 


Unique opportunity to own a like-new HCB 53 Sueños for a fraction of the price a new build. Fresh off an extensive refit, this particular 53 is turn-key condition and ready for its new owner. Sporting brand new Mercury Verado V12 600’s, a fresh whisper grey paint job, new Seakeeper 6, new generator, and a completely custom flybridge tower - there is not a comparable 53 Sueños on the current market. Whether it’s tendering to a superyacht, tournament fishing or anything in between, this vessel checks every box possible. 


Notable features and updates include:

  • New Mercury V12 600s (Unregistered)
  • New Seakeeper 5 (2 Years of Manufacturer Warranty)
  • New Generator 
  • New SeaDek 
  • Custom Flybridge Style Tower 
  • Full Suite of Garmin Electronics 
  • FLIR Nightvision
  • Dual Row Seating with Release Marine Teak Chairs
  • Forward Seating with High/Low Table
  • Leaning Post Refrigeration 
  • Forward Freezer Box 
  • Forward Lounge Seating 
  • Extreme JL Audio Package 
  • Dual Side Dive Doors
  • Custom Removable Freshwater Showers 


Available for showing by appointment in Coral Gables, FL

GeneralBoatDescription:
2020 Cruisers 38 GLS Outboard

The 38 GLS combines the bold styling and performance of the Cantius series with the versatility of outboard power. Designed for both adventure and comfort, this yacht features a unique fold-down beach door that expands your swim platform and offers unmatched water access. Below deck, the spacious cabin includes a private aft stateroom and a U-shaped dinette that easily converts into an additional berth. Whether you're entertaining dockside or cruising offshore, this 2020 38 GLS delivers a premium yachting experience with style, performance, and comfort. Her current owner has his sights set on a new vessel and is offering this 2020 38 GLS at a fraction of its replacement cost. 

Notable features include:

- (3) Mercury V8 Verado 300 

- Mercury JPO Joystick and Autopilot 

- Seakeeper Equipped

- Dual Simrad EVO Displays 

- Simrad Closed Array Radar 

- Exterior Wet Bar with Stools 

- Canvas Sunroof

- Folding Beach Door 

- Helm A/C

- Cockpit Grill

- Cockpit Refrigeration

- Cockpit Seating with Tables 

- Rockford Fosgate Audio 

- Custom Upholstery Covers 

Conveniently located and available for showings in Coral Gables, FL.

GeneralBoatDescription:
2019/2026 HCB 53 Sueños 

(New Quad Yamaha 425 XTO)


Unique opportunity to acquire fully updated HCB 53 Sueños for a fraction of the price a new build. Fresh off an extensive refit, this particular 53 is turn-key condition and ready for its new owner. Sporting brand new Yamaha 425 XTOs, a fresh whisper grey paint job, New Seakeeper 6, new generator, new Garmin electronics and a full teak deck with covering boards - there is not a comparable 53 Sueños on the current market. Whether it’s tendering to a superyacht, tournament fishing or anything in between, this vessel checks every box possible and is available for immediate delivery. 


Notable features and updates include:

  • New Yamaha 425 XTOS (7 Years of YES Warranty)
  • New Seakeeper 6 (2 Years of Manufacturer Warranty)
  • New Westerberke Generator 
  • New Whisper Grey Hull Paint 
  • New Medium Grey Hardtop and Metal Paint 
  • Upgraded Diamond Stitch Upholstery
  • Custom Teak Deck and Covering Boards
  • New Suite of Garmin Electronics 
  • Dual Row Seating with Teak Helm Chairs
  • Forward Seating with High/Low Table
  • Leaning Post Refrigeration 
  • Forward Freezer Box 
  • Forward Lounge Seating 
  • Extreme Audio Package 
  • Dual Side Dive Doors


Available for showing by appointment in Coral Gables, FL

GeneralBoatDescription:
2016 Aquila 44

Exceptional opportunity to own a captain-maintained 2016 Aquila 44, meticulously cared for and thoughtfully upgraded throughout her ownership.

Featuring the highly sought-after 3-cabin, 3-head layout, this vessel offers unmatched interior volume and comfort for a 44-foot yacht.

Enjoy a panoramic 360° view from the expansive salon and galley, designed with a spacious seating area, hidden TV compartment, and abundant storage—ideal for both liveaboard living and extended cruising.

Interior Highlights

  • Elegant Corian countertops
  • Electric refrigerator and freezer, stove, and stainless steel microwave
  • Double stainless steel sink
  • Luxurious staterooms with ample headroom and large panoramic windows
  • Separate shower stalls, freshwater flush heads, and teak flooring add comfort and style

Exterior & Deck Features

  • Expansive flybridge with new full enclosure
  • Electric grill and sunpad seating flanking the central helm
  • Bridge-to-bow direct access
  • Custom aft sunshade for added sun protection

Notable Updates

  • All services up to date
  • New A/C systems
  • New radar
  • New turbos
  • New exterior upholstery
  • New flybridge enclosure
  • Custom aft sunshade
  • Tender included
  • New satellite TV dome

This Aquila 44 is available for private showings by appointment in Key Largo, Florida.

GeneralBoatDescription:
2013/2024 Contender 35 ST (LS)

Unique opportunity to own one of Contenders most sought after hulls that has been adapted and perfected for family cruising or tender support. Using the same legendary hull bottom as the 35ST, the 35LS offers some of the best performance numbers in existence for a 35ft Center Console. 

This particular 35 LS has been completely refit by her sole owner in 2024. She received a complete  paint job, full rewire and a new suite of Garmin electronics just to name a few. 

Notable features and upgrades:

- Triple Yamaha F300s with under 600 original hours

- New Garmin 8600 Series Electronics 

- New Custom Black Acrylic Dash

- New Switch Panel 

- New Yamaha Binnacle

- New JL Audio Sound System 

- Awlgrip Snow White Paint Job (hull, interior, non-skid, piping, t-top and motors)

- New Custom Upholstery 

- New Pumps 

- New Limited Lighting 

- New Spotlight 

- Cockpit Grill

- Teak Interior Accents in Console 

- Custom Full Cover 


Lift kept and available to show by appointment only in Coral Gables, FL.
AdditionalDetailDescription:
Standard Equipment

Hull & Deck

  • Hand-Laid Fiberglass Throughout High Tech Construction Using Multi-Directional Fabric & Foam Cored Solid Glass Stringer System
  • Foam Floatation
  • Integral Dive Platform, Full Transom & Transom Door
  • Self-Bailing Cockpit
  • Non-Skid Cockpit Sole & Deck
  • Heavy Duty Rub Rail
  • Choice of Hull & Deck Gelcoat Colors
  • Hand-Painted Boot & Pin Stripe

Cockpit Sole & Deck Compartments

  • Forward Anchor Locker w/Storage
  • (1) 208 Gal. Fully Lined & Insulated Forward Fish Box
  • (1) 115 Gal. Fully Lined & Insulated Forward Fish Box
  • (2) 85 Gal. Fully Lined & Insulated Forward Aft Fish Boxes (Port & Strbd)
  • (2) 40 Gal. Round Livewells, Aft Above Deck (Excludes Plumbing)

Console

  • Extra Large Walk-In Console w/Head Compartment
  • Oversized Electronics Panel
  • Molded in Front Console Seat
  • Lockable Storage Inside Console
  • Custom Helm Pod

Mechanical

  • International Lighting
  • Recessed Pop-Up Bow Light
  • Dual Hydraulic Steering w/Custom Steering Wheel
  • Kiekaffer Recessed Trim Tabs
  • Waterproof Switches & Breaker Panel w/Indicator Lights
  • 2000 GPH Auto/Manual Bilge Pump
  • Compass

Hardware

  • Chrome on Bronze or Stainless Steel Hardware
  • Heavy Duty Recessed Bow Lifting Ring w/Cleat (Pop-Up)
  • (2) Heavy Duty Stern Lifting Rings
  • (2) 10” Stern Cleats
  • (2) 8” Spring Line Cleats with Hause Pipes - Midship
  • (4) Lee’s Flush Mount Gunnel Rod Holders
  • Recessed Bow Handrails
